title: Fix CSV/XLS unit ID resolution — Address column not found

requirements.text: Fix the CSV/XLS parser so that unit IDs are correctly resolved from the 'Address' column in Waggle Portal export files. The debug panel shows unitId='Address not found' for every row even though col 25 is mapped to 'Address' and the header row is correctly detected. The parser must locate the Address column by scanning the detected header row for the keyword 'Address' (case-insensitive) and use that column index to read each row's unit ID, rather than failing silently and emitting 'Address not found'.

quotes: unitId='Address not found' total='aggregated' stored='aggregated' valid='aggregated' pktState='Normal'

acceptanceCriteria: Uploading the Waggle Portal XLS file no longer produces 'Address not found' unit IDs.
The debug panel shows actual unit ID values (e.g. device serial numbers) for the first 3 sample rows.
The '2648 rows will be skipped due to missing or invalid unit IDs' warning is resolved and valid records are found.
The 'No valid records found in the file' error message is no longer shown when a valid Waggle Portal export is imported.
Column mapping in the debug panel correctly identifies col 25 as 'Address' and reads non-empty values from it.

requirements.text: Audit the per-packet event log aggregation logic in csvParser.ts to ensure that total, stored, and valid packet counts are computed correctly from row aggregation after the Address column fix is applied. If the counts are still showing 'aggregated' placeholders rather than real numbers after fixing unit ID resolution, ensure the aggregation logic runs and populates numeric values before records are submitted to the backend.
acceptanceCriteria: After importing a valid file, records show numeric values for total, stored, and valid packet counts.
The dashboard and report pages reflect the imported data with correct packet count figures.

constraints: Do not change the backend schema or Motoko actor.
Do not modify any files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui.
nonGoals: Adding new import file formats beyond CSV/XLS/XLSX.
Changing the column mapping UI or custom column selection behavior.
